LAW AND MOTION, 301,PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION PER EX PARTE ORDER OF SEPTEMBER 20, 2005. PETITONER IS REQUESTED TO SUBMIT TWO FORMS OF ORDERS FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION. JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER ROBERT BALIAN CSR # 5220. (301/PHA/DS), SUBMITTED ON SEP-27-2005 BY PAUL H. ALVARADO.

A R G U E D AND the Court MODIFIED its Tentative Ruling AND TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION RE: PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION PER EX PARTE ORDER OF SEPTEMBER 20, 2005. PETITONER IS REQUESTED TO SUBMIT TWO FORMS OF ORDERS FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION.
